title: Add Thumbsnare to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Thumbsnare](https://thumbsnare.vercel.app/) to image
- Thumbsnare generates YouTube thumbnail concepts from a video idea, using title, creative angle, target audience, and visual direction to create structured options for review and export.

Fixes #11673

gist.headline: Thumbnails catch the light
gist.blurb: Thumbsnare has landed in the garden: feed it a video idea and it grows structured YouTube thumbnail concepts for review and export. Fewer blank canvases, more tiny billboards with opinions.
gist.summary: Added Thumbsnare to the Pollinations apps directory, giving creators a tool that turns a video idea, title, creative angle, target audience, and visual direction into structured YouTube thumbnail concepts.
gist.impact: Creators can now find Thumbsnare through Pollinations and quickly explore reviewable, export-ready thumbnail directions before making the final pixels.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Thumbsnare as a cozy thumbnail-design garden: several small framed YouTube-style concept cards sprout from pots labeled title, audience, angle, and visual direction. Polly, wearing a tiny director beret and holding a clipboard, tends the cards while a friendly CRT robot compares the thumbnail options; use flowers and vines to make the ideation process feel like growing concepts rather than filling out a form.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, a cute yellow bee with dark brown stripes, black antennae and oval eyes, pink rectangular cheek blushes, a happy smile, and rounded light-blue translucent wings, wearing a tiny director beret as she holds a clipboard beside a garden of framed YouTube thumbnail concept cards sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) pots labeled in simple pixel text “TITLE”, “AUDIENCE”, and “ANGLE”; a cute CRT monitor robot eagerly compares the cards while code-vines and flowers curl around a retro desk. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green and pastel gradient background, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, nostalgic and emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, a cute yellow bee with dark brown stripes, black antennae and oval eyes, pink rectangular cheek blushes, a happy smile, and rounded light-blue translucent wings, wearing a tiny director beret as she holds a clipboard beside a garden of framed YouTube thumbnail concept cards sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) pots labeled in simple pixel text “TITLE”, “AUDIENCE”, and “ANGLE”; a cute CRT monitor robot eagerly compares the cards while code-vines and flowers curl around a retro desk. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green and pastel gradient background, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, nostalgic and emotionally warm.
